Umbraco.description: Configuration container for all Umbraco products.

UmbracoAutomateDefinition.description:
Root Umbraco.Automate configuration (Umbraco:Automate). Inherits the
root-level switches from AutomateOptions and adds the
known sub-section options as nested objects.

Enabled.description: Gets or sets whether the automation engine is enabled.

UseNamedConnectionString.description:
Gets or sets the name of the connection string Automate resolves from
ConnectionStrings. Defaults to umbracoAutomateDbDSN so a standard
dedicated configuration just works. Set to umbracoDbDSN to share the
Umbraco CMS database, or to any other named entry so multiple products can share
a single DSN.

AllowedConfigurationKeyPrefixes.description:
Gets or sets the IConfiguration key
prefixes that automation settings may dereference via the $Key:Path syntax.

SecretConfigurationKeyPrefixes.description:
Gets or sets the subset of AllowedConfigurationKeyPrefixes whose values
are treated as secret, and which may therefore only be referenced from settings fields
marked [Field(IsSensitive = true)].

WebhookOptions.description:
Configuration options for the webhook endpoint.
Bound to Umbraco:Automate:Webhook in appsettings.json.

MaxPayloadBytes.description:
Gets or sets the maximum allowed webhook payload size in bytes.
Requests exceeding this limit are rejected with 413 Payload Too Large.
Default: 1 MB.

RateLimitPerMinute.description:
Gets or sets the maximum number of webhook requests per automation per minute.
Requests exceeding this limit are rejected with 429 Too Many Requests.
Default: 100.

ExecutionOptions.description:
Configuration options for automation execution.
Bound to Umbraco:Automate:Execution in appsettings.json.

DefaultTimeout.description: Gets or sets the default timeout per step.

DefaultMaxRetries.description:
Gets or sets the default maximum number of retries for a failed step when the
step's own MaxRetries is not set.
Prevents a transient failure from retrying indefinitely.

DefaultRetryInterval.description:
Gets or sets the default retry interval for a failed step when the step's own
RetryInterval is not set. Without this, WorkflowCore
falls back to its built-in 60-second default.

MaxConcurrentRuns.description: Gets or sets the maximum number of concurrent runs.

PollInterval.description: Gets or sets the WorkflowCore poll interval.

MaxChainDepth.description:
Gets or sets the maximum automation chain depth. When an event carries a chain
depth at or above this limit, the dispatcher drops it instead of starting another
run. Hard backstop against runaway cascades; per-trigger
SkipAutomationOriginatedEvents is the first line of defence.

MaxInlineOutputBytes.description:
Gets or sets the maximum size, in UTF-8 encoded bytes, of a step's serialized output
that is inlined into the WorkflowCore workflow data (which is re-serialized on every
execution pass). Larger outputs are stored only on the step run record — written once —
and referenced from the workflow data, hydrated on demand when a binding reads them.
Default: 16 KB.

MaxHttpResponseBodyBytes.description:
Gets or sets the maximum HTTP response body size, in bytes, accepted by the built-in
HTTP Request action. Responses exceeding the limit fail the step with an actionable
error instead of flooding run storage with megabytes of payload. Default: 10 MB.

Mode.description: Gets or sets the execution mode for workflow processing.

ExecutionMode.description: Controls which nodes participate in workflow execution.

GovernanceOptions.description:
Configuration options for governance and audit features.
Bound to Umbraco:Automate:Governance in appsettings.json.

AuditLogEnabled.description: Gets or sets whether the audit log is enabled.

AuditLogRetentionDays.description: Gets or sets the number of days to retain audit log data.

SensitiveDataMasking.description: Gets or sets whether sensitive data is masked in run logs.

DefaultNotifyOn.description: Gets or sets the default notification policy for new automations.

ScheduledTriggerOptions.description:
Configuration options for the scheduled trigger background job.
Bound to Umbraco:Automate:ScheduledTrigger in appsettings.json.

PollInterval.description: Gets or sets the poll interval for checking scheduled triggers.

StartupDelay.description: Gets or sets the startup delay before the first poll.

MaxJitter.description:
Gets or sets the maximum jitter applied to scheduled triggers configured as
Flexible. Each automation gets a deterministic
per-id offset within [0, MaxJitter], spreading load when many automations
share a CRON tick. Set to Zero to disable jitter entirely.

CircuitBreakerOptions.description:
Configuration options for the circuit breaker that auto-disables a "sick" automation
(one failing on every trigger due to misconfiguration).
Bound to Umbraco:Automate:CircuitBreaker in appsettings.json.

Enabled.description: Gets or sets whether the circuit breaker is enabled globally.

ConsecutiveWarningThreshold.description:
Gets or sets the number of consecutive failures that issues a degradation warning
(transitions to Degraded). Set lower than
ConsecutiveFailureThreshold so the warning is reachable in the common
"keeps failing" path before the disable threshold trips.

ConsecutiveFailureThreshold.description: Gets or sets the number of consecutive failures before an automation is disabled.

WarningErrorRate.description: Gets or sets the error rate (0.0–1.0) over the evaluation window that triggers a warning.

DisableErrorRate.description: Gets or sets the error rate (0.0–1.0) over the evaluation window that triggers auto-disable.

EvaluationWindowSize.description:
Gets or sets the number of recent terminal runs evaluated for the error-rate calculation.
Error-rate thresholds only apply once at least this many terminal runs exist.

GracePeriodAfterWarning.description:
Gets or sets the grace period after a warning before auto-disable can trigger,
giving the owner time to investigate and fix.
